banner.title: Personal settings layout updated
banner.body: The menu is now organised by purpose. Old URLs redirect to the new pages.

modal.title: New personal settings layout
modal.description: We replaced the "Security" tab with six purpose-driven sections.

items.developer: "Developer": CLI token, API keys, MCP connections
items.lock: Lock the vault from the new header icon button — one click

movedNotice.title: This page moved
movedNotice.body: This page moved to "{section}". Please update your bookmarks.
